'''Zackery''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the head of [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] security.

==Biography==
Before the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Zackery was the head of the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate security]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He threw [[Keets Freely]] out of the Senate building on numerous occasions, and even found him in a [[Senator/Legends|Senator's]] office.

When the Empire took over, Zackery remained head of security, and, once more, caught Keets in a Senate office, along with [[Curran Caladian]]. After Zackery imprisoned them, the two managed to escape, using a blaster that one of [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster's]] old [[Droid/Legends|droid]] had brought them.
